app.title: LegalChain — Compliant Blockchain 3.0 Ledger
app.subtitle: Educational post-quantum distributed ledger
consensus.pow: Proof of Work: miners search for a nonce so the block hash meets a difficulty target. Costly to produce, one hash to verify; security comes from accumulated energy expenditure.
consensus.pos: Proof of Stake: a stake-weighted lottery selects the validator. Security comes from economic skin-in-the-game and slashing; energy use is negligible.
consensus.bft: Byzantine Fault Tolerance: with 3f+1 validators, a quorum of 2f+1 votes finalizes a block even if f validators are malicious. Immediate finality, no forks.
pqc.mldsa: ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204, CRYSTALS-Dilithium): lattice-based signatures replacing ECDSA; secure against Shor's algorithm.
pqc.mlkem: ML-KEM-768 (FIPS 203, CRYSTALS-Kyber): key encapsulation deriving one-time AES-256 session keys for the P2P channel.
pqc.qkd: QKD-inspired: fresh session keys per connection, never stored, immune to harvest-now-decrypt-later attacks.
nft.creator: Creator (SSI fingerprint)
